summary: Comprehensive Accountant Board Frontend Testing - All 4 pages (AccountantDashboard, HRPortal, ChequeManagement, PaymentProcessing) fully functional with complete UI/UX verification

test_credentials.accountant: Priya Sharma (Accountant) - Quick access button on login page

seed_data_creation: Test Employee (EMP0001), Cheque CHQ123456 (₹1,00,000 from ABC Suppliers), Payment request for XYZ Contractors (₹75,000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive Accountant Board fully functional. All 4 pages tested: AccountantDashboard, HRPortal, ChequeManagement, PaymentProcessing. MOCK OTP is displayed on screen for testing since Resend API key is not configured.

details: Total Income/Expense/Profit summary cards working
Income by Payment Method breakdown (Cash, Cheque, Bank Transfer, UPI, Credit Card) displayed
HR & Payroll summary card shows 1 Total Staff, 1 Pending Payroll
Cheque Management summary card shows 1 Pending Cheques, 0 Bounced
Project-wise Income & Expense table with 4 projects visible
Quick action buttons (Record Income, View Expenses, Process Payroll, Pending Approvals) clickable
Navigation buttons (OTP Payments, Approvals, HR, Cheques) all functional
Staff Management tab with Staff Directory table
Search staff input (data-testid: search-staff) working
Department filter dropdown (data-testid: filter-department) working
Add Staff button (data-testid: add-staff-btn) opens dialog

Add Staff dialog has all fields: Name, Email, Phone, Department, Designation, Date of Joining, Salary Details (Basic, HRA, DA, TA, Other Allowances), Deductions (PF, ESI, Professional Tax, TDS, Other), Bank Details (Bank Name, Account Number, IFSC, Payment Method)
Gross Salary and Net Salary calculated automatically
Staff added successfully - Test Employee with EMP0001 code created
Payroll tab with Generate Payroll button (data-testid: generate-payroll-btn)
Generate Payroll dialog with Month/Year selection
Payroll generated successfully for Feb 2026
Payroll status shows Draft with Approve button
Summary cards (Total Cheques, Incoming, Outgoing, Pending, Bounced, Cleared)
Filter tabs (All, Incoming, Outgoing, Pending, Bounced)
Cheques table with columns (CHEQUE NO, BANK, PARTY, PROJECT, TYPE, AMOUNT, DATE, STATUS, ACTION)
Search cheques input (data-testid: search-cheques)
Add Cheque button (data-testid: add-cheque-btn) opens dialog

Add New Cheque dialog has all fields: Cheque Details (Number, Amount, Date, Type), Bank Details (Bank Name, Branch, Account Number, IFSC), Party & Project (Name, Type, Project), Post-Dated Cheque option, Remarks
Cheque CHQ123456 added successfully - ₹1,00,000 from HDFC Bank, ABC Suppliers
Cheque shows as Incoming (IN) with Issued status
Summary cards (Awaiting OTP, OTP Verified, Completed, Total Processed)
Payment Requests table with columns (REQUEST ID, TYPE, PARTY, AMOUNT, STATUS, REQUESTED BY, ACTION)
New Payment button (data-testid: new-payment-btn) opens dialog
Initiate New Payment dialog with Payment Type, Party Name, Amount, Email (for OTP), Phone
Note shown: Leave empty for mock OTP (testing mode)
Payment request created for XYZ Contractors ₹75,000
MOCK OTP displayed prominently: TEST MODE - OTP: 701526
OTP verification dialog appears with OTP input field
Verify OTP button shows in payment requests table for otp_sent status
Dashboard -> Payment Processing via OTP Payments button
Dashboard -> HR Portal via HR button
Dashboard -> Cheque Management via Cheques button
Dashboard -> Accounts Board via Approvals button
Back navigation from all pages to Accountant Dashboard

mocked_apis.otp_email: OTP email sending is MOCKED - displays OTP on screen for testing since Resend API key is not configured

ui_quality.design: Clean, modern UI with gradient cards and proper color coding
ui_quality.accessibility: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
